overall.description: A completely static scene from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a white cowboy hat sitting inside a tent at night, looking out at a flickering campfire. The atmosphere is calm and isolated, with the warm firelight contrasting against the dark blue night.

scene_state.functional_zone: campsite tent interior looking out to fire

agents.ego_description: Character wearing a distinctive white hat sits motionless inside the tent, facing the opening and observing the campfire outside

entered.detail: Brown canvas tent wall forming the left side of the tent opening
Brown canvas tent wall forming the right side of the tent opening
Vertical wooden tent pole supporting the tent structure at the entrance
Small flickering campfire burning outside the tent entrance providing warm orange light
Grassy ground visible just outside the tent entrance
Dark night sky visible through the tent opening above the campfire

segments.scene_description: The scene remains completely static throughout, showing a character sitting inside a tent at night. The camera looks out through the triangular tent opening toward a small flickering campfire, with brown canvas tent walls framing the view on both sides. The warm firelight illuminates the grass immediately outside while the dark night sky is visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a completely static perspective from within a sheltered tent, gazing out into a quiet, nocturnal wilderness. It begins with a view framed by brown canvas walls, focusing on a small, flickering campfire that serves as the sole source of light. As the flames dance, the warm glow steadily illuminates the surrounding grass, creating a sharp contrast against the deep shadows of the interior. The scene remains fixed in this composition, allowing the eye to drift from the intimate warmth of the hearth toward the vast, dark night sky visible in the distance.
